tasks.label: git-commit
tasks.command:
git add -A && git commit -m "fix: assignment duplicate handling, draft content gating, sidebar pointer-events

- API: duplicate assignments return 200 (not 409) when all blocked are duplicates
- API: add resend flag to bypass duplicate check and re-assign existing assignments
- API: new POST /api/admin/content/[id]/review route (draft/generated -> reviewed)
- UI: ContentCard shows 'Review to assign' button for draft/generated content
- UI: AssignmentPanel shows warning banner when selected content is draft/generated
- UI: content-library page handles allDuplicates response with Resend action
- UI: admin assignments page passes resend:true when reassigning existing assignments
- UI: AdminSidebar adds pointer-events-none when hidden, adds mobile backdrop overlay
- Tests: assignment_duplicate_flow.test.ts with 10 pure-function coverage cases"

tasks.label: git-commit-2
tasks.command: git add -A && git commit -m "fix: assignment duplicate handling, draft content gating, sidebar pointer-events"

tasks.label: git-commit-3
tasks.command: git add -A && git commit -F tmp_commit_msg.txt && Remove-Item tmp_commit_msg.txt
